creator: ek@purplehat.org
text:
Created attachment 223183
Patch for security/maia version 1.0.4_6

Code fixes for Perl and PHP 7.4 support
Removed WDDX dependency
Added Nginx option
Replaced hard-coded paths to perl with /usr/bin/env

Passed portlint and Poudriere build logs can be found at http://clarkson.purplehat.org/data/latest-per-pkg/maia/1.0.4_6/freebsd_12-2x64-HEAD.log
